- 新增收藏夹页面，可以收藏本地视频、本地文件夹、云端服务器根目录、云端文件夹和云端文件
- 新增播放标记，可以在长视频里记录当前位置，并从标记列表快速跳回
- 新增播放器锁定和静音控制按钮，现代布局和传统布局都会按各自交互方式显示
- 新增控制栏显示时压暗视频的开关，并把自动隐藏时间改为禁用、15 秒、1 分钟和自定义
- 优化云端视频打开方式，让 FTP、WebDAV 和 SMB 的播放列表、续播记录和字幕目录更稳定

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Add a favorites page for local videos, local folders, cloud server roots, cloud folders, and cloud files
- Add playback marks so long videos can be bookmarked and resumed from saved positions
- Add player lock and mute controls with behavior adapted for modern and legacy layouts
- Add an option to dim video while controls are visible, and replace auto-hide timing with disabled, 15 seconds, 1 minute, and custom choices
- Improve cloud video opening so FTP, WebDAV, and SMB playlists, resume records, and subtitle directories are more stable

</details>
